final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI mockup of a comprehensive design system featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls in a classic minimal tech style.

Style/medium: clean flat vector UI design system, sharp geometric precision in the spirit of Linear / Vercel design language, dark-mode-first
Composition: multi-panel layout showing Dashboard (top-left, largest), mobile screen (top-right), component library grid (bottom row: cards, buttons, toggles, sliders, inputs), generous spacing between panels
Subject: cohesive UI design system — web Dashboard with data charts, KPI cards, sidebar nav; mobile interface with bottom tab bar and list items; reusable components including outlined buttons, filled buttons, toggle switches, progress bars, and input fields
Scene/backdrop: deep near-black background (#0A0A0F range), subtle grid or dot-matrix texture at low opacity to reinforce tech atmosphere
Lighting/mood: layered glow effects — electric blue and cyan accent halos on active elements, subtle purple gradient on hero panel edges, high visual hierarchy with strong contrast between surface levels
Color palette: near-black base, cool white for primary text, electric blue (#00AAFF range) as primary accent, cyan and violet as secondary accents, muted slate for inactive states
Materials/textures: frosted glass card surfaces with 1px luminous borders, smooth gradient fills on CTA buttons, crisp anti-aliased icon strokes at 1.5px
Constraints: all components must be visually consistent and clearly legible; spacing follows an 8pt grid; icons use a unified 24px stroke style; layout must communicate scalability across breakpoints
Avoid: skeuomorphic shadows, stock photo backgrounds, rainbow gradients, cluttered decoration, generic Bootstrap aesthetic, 8K stuffer labels
